Class ObserverFunction

java.lang.Object
org.key_project.logic.op.AbstractOperator
org.key_project.logic.op.AbstractSortedOperator
org.key_project.logic.op.Function
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.JFunction
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.ObserverFunction
All Implemented Interfaces:
IObserverFunction, Sorted, Named, Operator, SortedOperator, Sorted, SyntaxElement
Direct Known Subclasses:
ProgramMethod
public class ObserverFunction extends JFunction implements IObserverFunction
Objects of this class represent "observer" function or predicate symbols. An observer symbol is a symbol taking a heap array as its first argument, and an object as its second argument (unless it is static). Observer symbols are used to represent JML model fields as well as occurrences of pure methods in specifications (via the subclass ProgramMethod). As they come from the Java program, both their parameter sorts and their result sorts always have an associated KeYJavaType. Observer symbols serve as the targets of contracts (i.e., as the subjects that the contracts are about).

      public int getHeapCount(Services services)
      Description copied from interface: IObserverFunction
      Check the heap count of the declaration, e.g. the base heap and extra heap.
      Specified by:

    • getNumParams

      public final int getNumParams()
      Description copied from interface: IObserverFunction
      Gives the number of parameters of the observer symbol. "Parameters" here includes only the *explicit* parameters, not the heap and the receiver object. Thus, for observer symbols representing model fields, this will always return 0.
      Specified by:
      getNumParams in interface IObserverFunction

    • getParamType

      public final KeYJavaType getParamType(int i)
      Description copied from interface: IObserverFunction
      Gives the type of the i-th parameter of this observer symbol. "Parameters" here includes only the *explicit* parameters, not the heap and the receiver object.
      Specified by:
      getParamType in interface IObserverFunction

    • getParamTypes

      public final ImmutableArray<KeYJavaType> getParamTypes()
      Description copied from interface: IObserverFunction
      Returns the parameter types of this observer symbol. "Parameters" here includes only the *explicit* parameters, not the heap and the receiver object.
      Specified by:
      getParamTypes in interface IObserverFunction
